configurePresets.name: sitl-debug
configurePresets.description: Host SITL build with debug symbols. Default for day-to-day development.

configurePresets.name: sitl-release
configurePresets.description: Host SITL build with optimizations enabled.

configurePresets.name: kpu-cross
configurePresets.description: Cross-compile for the custom KPU silicon. Requires gcc-aarch64-linux-gnu and cross-toolchain.cmake. Tests are disabled (we have no aarch64 emulator step yet).

configurePresets.name: wsl2-sitl
configurePresets.displayName: WSL2 SITL (Linux build from Visual Studio)
configurePresets.description: SITL build invoked from Visual Studio 2022 on Windows via WSL2. Identical settings to sitl-debug; the Visual Studio vendor metadata routes the build through the Linux toolchain.

configurePresets.name: msvc
configurePresets.description: Native Windows build with the MSVC toolchain via the Visual Studio 2022 generator (multi-config: the build/test presets select Debug or Release). CMake locates the toolchain automatically — no vcvars / Developer Command Prompt setup needed. This is the CI Windows target and mirrors the primary VS2022 developer environment.

configurePresets.name: msvc-ninja
configurePresets.description: Windows MSVC build through Ninja instead of the Visual Studio generator, so sccache's compiler launcher actually takes effect (the VS generator ignores CMAKE_<LANG>_COMPILER_LAUNCHER). Single-config Release to match the Corrosion-built Rust CRT (/MD). CMAKE_MSVC_DEBUG_INFORMATION_FORMAT=Embedded forces /Z7 over /Zi so sccache isn't defeated by a shared PDB. Requires the MSVC environment to be active (cl.exe on PATH + INCLUDE/LIB set) — the CI job runs vcvars via msvc-dev-cmd. This is the CI Windows target; the `msvc` Visual Studio preset stays for local IDE work.

configurePresets.name: msvc-ninja-debug
configurePresets.description: Debug-config counterpart of msvc-ninja. Guards that the C++ Debug build links the Rust core under the project-wide /MD CRT pin — the case the Release CI build can't catch and the one the Visual Studio IDE hits by default (LNK2038 _ITERATOR_DEBUG_LEVEL / RuntimeLibrary). Same Ninja + sccache + embedded-debug-info setup, only the config differs.
